economic_notes: First Nation holds 50% interest in Western Alliance Tubulars Inc. through its business entity. COVID-19 impacted operations including increased pandemic expenditures and decreased casino/trust funding. Drinking water advisory class action settlement eligible participant.
notes: Fiscal year end is March 31, 2022 (not 2024). Consolidated entities include Moosomin First Nation Education Council Inc., Moosomin First Nation CMHC Housing Projects, and Moosomin First Nation Health Authority Inc. One GBE (Moosomin First Nation Economic Development Company Limited Partnership) accounted for by modified equity method. Moosomin 1909 Surrender Trust excluded from consolidation as Chief and Council do not control it. CMHC replacement and operating reserves are underfunded. Significant advance of $2,216,484 due from Western Alliance Tubulars Inc. with measurement uncertainty. Total government transfers calculated as ISC ($15,433,771) plus CMHC ($661,028) = $16,094,799. OSR calculated as total revenue ($19,829,545) minus total government transfers ($16,094,799) = $3,734,746. No schedule of remuneration included in provided text.
